latency_note: Local teaching measurements on a tiny corpus; not throughput, capacity, or tail-latency evidence.

local_pair_scorer.name: character_ngram_pair_scorer
local_pair_scorer.note: Character n-gram TF-IDF pair similarity is a transparent teaching reranker, not a neural cross-encoder.
local_pair_scorer.tuning_contract: Alpha is selected only on development labels; evaluation labels are held out until final scoring.

metric_contract.candidate_passage_recall: Fraction of labelled passages present before reranking; this is the reranker's ceiling.
metric_contract.mrr: Reciprocal rank of the first labelled passage, averaged over answerable queries.
metric_contract.ndcg_at_k: Position-discounted gain for labelled passages in the first k ranks.
metric_contract.top_1_accuracy: Share of answerable queries with a labelled passage at rank one.
